is_active.name: is_active
is_active.comment: Whether the campaign is active. Only applicable to trigger campaigns.

created_timestamp.name: created_timestamp
created_timestamp.comment: Timestamp when the campaign was created.

program_id.name: program_id
program_id.comment: ID of the parent program, if applicable.

updated_timestamp.name: updated_timestamp
updated_timestamp.comment: Timestamp when the campaign was most recently updated.

workspace_name.name: workspace_name
workspace_name.comment: Name of the parent workspace, if applicable.

computed_url.name: computed_url
computed_url.comment: The URL computed for the campaign, used for tracking or reference.

flow_id.name: flow_id
flow_id.comment: The ID of the flow associated with the campaign, defining the actions taken.

folder_id.name: folder_id
folder_id.comment: ID of the folder where the campaign is stored in Marketo.

folder_type.name: folder_type
folder_type.comment: Type of folder (e.g., program, campaign) that stores the campaign.

is_communication_limit_enabled.name: is_communication_limit_enabled
is_communication_limit_enabled.comment: Whether the communication limit is enabled for the campaign.

is_requestable.name: is_requestable
is_requestable.comment: Indicates if the campaign can be requested externally.

is_system.name: is_system
is_system.comment: Whether the campaign is a system-level campaign.

max_members.name: max_members
max_members.comment: Maximum number of members that can be part of the campaign.

qualification_rule_type.name: qualification_rule_type
qualification_rule_type.comment: Type of qualification rule governing campaign entry.

qualification_rule_interval.name: qualification_rule_interval
qualification_rule_interval.comment: Interval for the qualification rule, specifying campaign entry frequency.

qualification_rule_unit.name: qualification_rule_unit
qualification_rule_unit.comment: Unit for the qualification interval (e.g., hours, days).

recurrence_start_at.name: recurrence_start_at
recurrence_start_at.comment: Timestamp when the recurrence of the campaign starts.

recurrence_end_at.name: recurrence_end_at
recurrence_end_at.comment: Timestamp when the recurrence of the campaign ends.

recurrence_interval_type.name: recurrence_interval_type
recurrence_interval_type.comment: Type of interval for the recurrence (e.g., daily, weekly).

recurrence_weekday_only.name: recurrence_weekday_only
recurrence_weekday_only.comment: Whether recurrence occurs only on weekdays.

recurrence_day_of_month.name: recurrence_day_of_month
recurrence_day_of_month.comment: Day of the month when the campaign recurs.

recurrence_day_of_week.name: recurrence_day_of_week
recurrence_day_of_week.comment: Day of the week when the campaign recurs.

recurrence_week_of_month.name: recurrence_week_of_month
recurrence_week_of_month.comment: Week of the month when the campaign recurs (e.g., first week).

smart_list_id.name: smart_list_id
smart_list_id.comment: ID of the smart list associated with the campaign, used for targeting.

status.name: status
status.comment: Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused).

count_sends.name: count_sends
count_sends.comment: Count of total sends from related email sends.

count_opens.comment: Count of total opens from related email sends.

count_bounces.comment: Count of total bounces from related email sends.

metadata.name: marketo__email_sends
metadata.comment: Each record is a sent email in Marketo to a user.

activity_timestamp.name: activity_timestamp
activity_timestamp.comment: The timestamp the email was sent.

activity_type_id.name: activity_type_id
activity_type_id.comment: The ID of the activity type.

action_result.name: action_result
action_result.comment: The outcome of a specific action performed within the Marketo platform.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: The ID of the email's campaign.

campaign_run_id.name: campaign_run_id
campaign_run_id.comment: The ID of the email's campaign run.

choice_number.name: choice_number
choice_number.comment: The choice number of the current step that triggered the activity.

email_template_id.name: email_template_id
email_template_id.comment: The ID of the email's template.

lead_id.name: lead_id
lead_id.comment: The ID of the lead related to the activity.

primary_attribute_value.name: primary_attribute_value
primary_attribute_value.comment: The primary attribute of the activity.

primary_attribute_value_id.name: primary_attribute_value_id
primary_attribute_value_id.comment: The ID of the primary attribute of the activity.

step_id.name: step_id
step_id.comment: The Id of the current step in the flow.

email_send_id.name: email_send_id
email_send_id.comment: The inferred ID for the email sent.

activity_rank.name: activity_rank
activity_rank.comment: Assigned rank for a given email_send_id, determined by ascending order of activity_timestamp. Earliest activity_timestamp gets rank 1.

count_opens.name: count_opens
count_opens.comment: Count of total opens from related email sends.

count_bounces.name: count_bounces
count_bounces.comment: Count of total bounces from related email sends.

count_clicks.name: count_clicks
count_clicks.comment: Count of total clicks from related email sends.

count_deliveries.name: count_deliveries
count_deliveries.comment: Count of total deliveries from related email sends.

count_unsubscribes.name: count_unsubscribes
count_unsubscribes.comment: Count of total unsubscribes from related email sends.

was_opened.name: was_opened
was_opened.comment: Whether the email send was opened.

was_clicked.name: was_clicked
was_clicked.comment: Whether the email send was clicked.

was_delivered.name: was_delivered
was_delivered.comment: Whether the email send was delivered.

was_unsubscribed.name: was_unsubscribed
was_unsubscribed.comment: Whether the email send resulted in the user unsubscribing.

campaign_type.name: campaign_type
campaign_type.comment: The type of the email send's campaign.

program_id.name: program_id
program_id.comment: The ID of the email send's program.

is_operational.name: is_operational
is_operational.comment: Whether the email send was operational.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.comment: Each record is the most recent version of an email template.

folder_name.comment: The name of the email template's folder.

folder_type.name: folder_type
folder_type.comment: The type of the email template's folder.

folder_value.name: folder_value
folder_value.comment: The value of the email template's folder.

is_operational.name: is_operational
is_operational.comment: Whether the email is operational. Operational emails bypass unsubscribe status. Defaults to false.

program_id.name: program_id
program_id.comment: The ID of the email template's program.

publish_to_msi.name: publish_to_msi
publish_to_msi.comment: Whether the email is published to Marketo Sales Insight.

email_template_status.name: email_template_status
email_template_status.comment: Status filter for draft or approved versions.

is_text_only.name: is_text_only
is_text_only.comment: Setting to include text-only version of email when sent.

updated_timestamp.name: updated_timestamp
updated_timestamp.comment: Timestamp the email template was last updated.

email_template_url.name: email_template_url
email_template_url.comment: URL of the email template in the Marketo UI.

version_type.name: version_type
version_type.comment: The type version of the email, either '1' or '2'.

has_web_view_enabled.name: has_web_view_enabled
has_web_view_enabled.comment: Whether 'View as Webpage' function is enabled for the email.

inferred_version.name: inferred_version
inferred_version.comment: Incrementing integer version of the email template.

total_count_of_versions.name: total_count_of_versions
total_count_of_versions.comment: Count of records for a given email_template_id.

valid_from.name: valid_from
valid_from.comment: When the version of the email template was is valid from.

valid_to.name: valid_to
valid_to.comment: When the version of the email template was is valid to.

is_most_recent_version.name: is_most_recent_version
is_most_recent_version.comment: Whether it is the most recent version of the email template.

email_template_history_id.name: email_template_history_id
email_template_history_id.comment: ID of the version of the email template.

count_sends.comment: Count of total sends from related email sends.

metadata.name: marketo__lead_history
metadata.comment:
Each record is what a Marketo lead looked like on each day. The columns in this model are specified with the `lead_history_columns` variable.
The start date is configured by the `marketo__first_date` variable, which by default, for dbt Core™ users, is the date of the earliest lead record. For Fivetran Quickstart Data Model users, `marketo__first_date` is 18 months in the past. There is currently no way to adjust this within the Quickstart environment, though incremental model runs will slowly look further and further in the past. However, please be aware that a full refresh will reset the clock and limit data to 18 months prior.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: The date of the lead was observed in this state. For dbt Core™ users, the default earliest `date_day` will be the date of the earliest lead record. This can be adjusted via the `marketo__first_date` variable. For Fivetran Quickstart Data Model users, `marketo__first_date` is 18 months in the past. There is currently no way to adjust this within the Quickstart environment, though incremental model runs will slowly look further and further in the past. However, please be aware that a full refresh will reset the clock and limit data to 18 months prior.

lead_history_id.name: lead_history_id
lead_history_id.comment: Surrogate key hashing date_day, lead_id, and source_relation.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: marketo__leads
metadata.comment: Each record is a Marketo lead.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: The timestamp when the record was last synced by Fivetran.

created_timestamp.name: created_timestamp
created_timestamp.comment: Timestamp for when each lead was created.

email.name: email
email.comment: The email address of the lead.

first_name.name: first_name
first_name.comment: The first name of the lead.

last_name.name: last_name
last_name.comment: The last name of the lead.

updated_timestamp.name: updated_timestamp
updated_timestamp.comment: Timestamp for when each lead was updated.

main_phone.name: main_phone
main_phone.comment: Primary phone number of the lead’s company

inferred_company.name: inferred_company
inferred_company.comment: Company name inferred by reverse IP lookup of the lead’s first recorded web visit

address_lead.name: address_lead
address_lead.comment: Second address associated with the lead.

state_code.name: state_code
state_code.comment: Alpha-2 code of the Lead’s state

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.comment: Alpha-2 code of the Lead’s country

billing_street.name: billing_street
billing_street.comment: Billing street address of the lead’s company

billing_city.name: billing_city
billing_city.comment: City of the lead’s billing address

billing_state.name: billing_state
billing_state.comment: State or province of the lead’s billing address

billing_state_code.name: billing_state_code
billing_state_code.comment: Alpha-2 code of the state or province of the lead’s billing address

billing_country.name: billing_country
billing_country.comment: Country of the lead’s billing address

billing_country_code.name: billing_country_code
billing_country_code.comment: Alpha-2 code of the country of the lead’s billing address

billing_postal_code.name: billing_postal_code
billing_postal_code.comment: Postal code of the lead’s billing address

inferred_city.name: inferred_city
inferred_city.comment: Lead’s city inferred by reverse IP lookup of lead’s first recorded web visit.

inferred_state_region.name: inferred_state_region
inferred_state_region.comment: Lead’s state region inferred by reverse IP lookup of lead’s first recorded web visit.

inferred_country.name: inferred_country
inferred_country.comment: Country inferred by reverse IP lookup of the lead’s first recorded web visit

inferred_postal_code.name: inferred_postal_code
inferred_postal_code.comment: Lead’s postal code inferred by reverse IP lookup of lead’s first recorded web visit.

inferred_phone_area_code.name: inferred_phone_area_code
inferred_phone_area_code.comment: Lead’s phone area code inferred by reverse IP lookup of lead’s first recorded web visit.

anonymous_ip.name: anonymous_ip
anonymous_ip.comment: IP address of the lead’s first recorded web visit

is_unsubscribed.name: is_unsubscribed
is_unsubscribed.comment: Lead’s email-unsubscribed status (boolean). Partially system managed. Will prevent receipt of non-operational emails if set to true.

is_email_invalid.name: is_email_invalid
is_email_invalid.comment: Email invalid status (boolean). All emails to the address will be blocked if set to true. Bounces indicating that the email is invalid will automatically set this field to true.

is_deleted.name: is_deleted
is_deleted.comment: Indicates if the lead record has been deleted.

merged_into_lead_id.name: merged_into_lead_id
merged_into_lead_id.comment: The ID of the lead into which this lead was merged.

is_merged.name: is_merged
is_merged.comment: Flag indicating whether the lead has been merged into another lead.

count_sends.comment: Count of total sends from related email sends.

count_opens.comment: Count of total opens from related email sends.

is_active.name: is_active
is_active.comment: Whether the campaign is active. Only applicable to trigger campaigns.

created_timestamp.name: created_timestamp
created_timestamp.comment: Timestamp when the campaign was created.

program_id.name: program_id
program_id.comment: ID of the parent program, if applicable.

updated_timestamp.name: updated_timestamp
updated_timestamp.comment: Timestamp when the campaign was most recently updated.

workspace_name.name: workspace_name
workspace_name.comment: Name of the parent workspace, if applicable.

computed_url.name: computed_url
computed_url.comment: The URL of the campaign in Marketo.

flow_id.name: flow_id
flow_id.comment: The ID of the flow that the campaign is associated with.

folder_id.name: folder_id
folder_id.comment: The ID of the folder that the campaign is stored in.

folder_type.name: folder_type
folder_type.comment: The type of folder that the campaign is stored in.

is_communication_limit_enabled.name: is_communication_limit_enabled
is_communication_limit_enabled.comment: Whether or not the campaign has a communication limit.

is_requestable.name: is_requestable
is_requestable.comment: Whether or not the campaign can be requested by leads.

is_system.name: is_system
is_system.comment: Whether or not the campaign is a system campaign.

max_members.name: max_members
max_members.comment: The maximum number of members that the campaign can have.

qualification_rule_type.name: qualification_rule_type
qualification_rule_type.comment: The type of qualification rule that the campaign uses.

qualification_rule_interval.name: qualification_rule_interval
qualification_rule_interval.comment: The interval for the qualification rule.

qualification_rule_unit.name: qualification_rule_unit
qualification_rule_unit.comment: The unit for the qualification rule.

recurrence_start_at.name: recurrence_start_at
recurrence_start_at.comment: The start date and time for the recurrence.

recurrence_end_at.name: recurrence_end_at
recurrence_end_at.comment: The end date and time for the recurrence.

recurrence_interval.name: recurrence_interval
recurrence_interval.comment: The value of the recurrence interval.

recurrence_weekday_only.name: recurrence_weekday_only
recurrence_weekday_only.comment: Whether or not the recurrence is limited to weekdays.

recurrence_day_of_month.name: recurrence_day_of_month
recurrence_day_of_month.comment: The day of the month for the recurrence.

recurrence_day_of_week.name: recurrence_day_of_week
recurrence_day_of_week.comment: The day of the week for the recurrence.

recurrence_week_of_month.name: recurrence_week_of_month
recurrence_week_of_month.comment: The week of the month for the recurrence.

smart_list_id.name: smart_list_id
smart_list_id.comment: The ID of the smart list that the campaign is associated with.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

created_timestamp.name: created_timestamp
created_timestamp.comment: Timestamp the email template was created.

folder_name.name: folder_name
folder_name.comment: The name of the email template's folder.

folder_id.name: folder_id
folder_id.comment: The ID of the email template's folder.

folder_type.name: folder_type
folder_type.comment: The type of the email template's folder.

folder_value.name: folder_value
folder_value.comment: The value of the email template's folder.

is_operational.name: is_operational
is_operational.comment: Whether the email is operational. Operational emails bypass unsubscribe status. Defaults to false.

program_id.name: program_id
program_id.comment: The ID of the email template's program.

publish_to_msi.name: publish_to_msi
publish_to_msi.comment: Whether the email is published to Marketo Sales Insight.

email_template_status.name: email_template_status
email_template_status.comment: Status filter for draft or approved versions.

is_text_only.name: is_text_only
is_text_only.comment: Setting to include text-only version of email when sent.

updated_timestamp.name: updated_timestamp
updated_timestamp.comment: Timestamp the email template was last updated.

email_template_url.name: email_template_url
email_template_url.comment: URL of the email template in the Marketo UI.

version_type.name: version_type
version_type.comment: The type version of the email, either '1' or '2'.

has_web_view_enabled.name: has_web_view_enabled
has_web_view_enabled.comment: Whether 'View as Webpage' function is enabled for the email.

inferred_version.name: inferred_version
inferred_version.comment: Incrementing integer version of the email template.

total_count_of_versions.name: total_count_of_versions
total_count_of_versions.comment: Count of versions of the email.

valid_from.name: valid_from
valid_from.comment: When the version of the email template was is valid from.

valid_to.name: valid_to
valid_to.comment: When the version of the email template was is valid to.

is_most_recent_version.name: is_most_recent_version
is_most_recent_version.comment: Whether it is the most recent version of the email template.

email_template_history_id.name: email_template_history_id
email_template_history_id.comment: ID of the version of the email template.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

created_timestamp.comment: The timestamp at which each lead object was created.

email.name: email
email.comment: The email address of the lead.

first_name.name: first_name
first_name.comment: The first name of the lead.

last_name.name: last_name
last_name.comment: The last name of the lead.

updated_timestamp.name: updated_timestamp
updated_timestamp.comment: The timestamp at which each lead object was last updated.

main_phone.name: main_phone
main_phone.comment: Primary phone number of the lead’s company

inferred_company.name: inferred_company
inferred_company.comment: Company name inferred by reverse IP lookup of the lead’s first recorded web visit

address_lead.name: address_lead
address_lead.comment: Second address associated with the lead.

state_code.name: state_code
state_code.comment: Alpha-2 code of the Lead’s state

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.comment: Alpha-2 code of the Lead’s country

billing_street.name: billing_street
billing_street.comment: Billing street address of the lead’s company

billing_city.name: billing_city
billing_city.comment: City of the lead’s billing address

billing_state.name: billing_state
billing_state.comment: State or province of the lead’s billing address

billing_state_code.name: billing_state_code
billing_state_code.comment: Alpha-2 code of the state or province of the lead’s billing address

billing_country.name: billing_country
billing_country.comment: Country of the lead’s billing address

billing_country_code.name: billing_country_code
billing_country_code.comment: Alpha-2 code of the country of the lead’s billing address

billing_postal_code.name: billing_postal_code
billing_postal_code.comment: Postal code of the lead’s billing address

inferred_city.name: inferred_city
inferred_city.comment: Lead’s city inferred by reverse IP lookup of lead’s first recorded web visit.

inferred_state_region.name: inferred_state_region
inferred_state_region.comment: Lead’s state region inferred by reverse IP lookup of lead’s first recorded web visit.

inferred_country.name: inferred_country
inferred_country.comment: Country inferred by reverse IP lookup of the lead’s first recorded web visit

inferred_postal_code.name: inferred_postal_code
inferred_postal_code.comment: Lead’s postal code inferred by reverse IP lookup of lead’s first recorded web visit.

inferred_phone_area_code.name: inferred_phone_area_code
inferred_phone_area_code.comment: Lead’s phone area code inferred by reverse IP lookup of lead’s first recorded web visit.

anonymous_ip.name: anonymous_ip
anonymous_ip.comment: IP address of the lead’s first recorded web visit

is_unsubscribed.name: is_unsubscribed
is_unsubscribed.comment: Lead’s email-unsubscribed status (boolean). Partially system managed. Will prevent receipt of non-operational emails if set to true.

is_email_invalid.name: is_email_invalid
is_email_invalid.comment: Email invalid status (boolean). All emails to the address will be blocked if set to true. Bounces indicating that the email is invalid will automatically set this field to true.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

field_max_length.comment: Max length of the field. Only applicable to text, string, and text area.
